name: The Secret of the Bandit
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>盗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>賊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>意</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can only be activated during Main Phase 1. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Each time the selected monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points this turn, your opponent discards 1 random card.
eff: This card can only be activated during Main Phase 1. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Each time the selected monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points this turn, your opponent discards 1 random card.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
